text: If you have career concerns clike here
response: Our career advisors are available to help you map out your journey! Please visit our 'Mentors' page to book a 1-on-1 session with an industry expert tailored to your field.

text: If you want to vedifai partner clike here
cleanText: I want to become a Vedifai partner
response: We love growing our network! To explore partnership opportunities, please email partners@vedifai.com with a brief overview of your proposal, and our team will get back to you within 48 hours.

text: If you have concer related products and services clike here
cleanText: I have concerns regarding products and services
response: For issues regarding course access, billing, or platform bugs, our technical team is here to help. You can email support@vedifai.com or check our FAQ section on the Support Hub.

text: If you wann to know more about your growth program connect your growth manager
cleanText: I want to know more about the growth program
response: Your dedicated Growth Manager is ready to assist! You can schedule a direct catch-up through your student dashboard, or drop a message in the 'Growth Forum' to connect with them.
